kw.name: Open Browser To Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Open Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates current browser session to page URL.
Opens browser, maximizes window, and navigates to page URL.

test.name: TC01 Verify login page loads successfully

kw.name: Open Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates current browser session to page URL.

kw.name: Enter User Name
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter text action for User Name (textbox) using page object locator.

kw.name: Enter Password
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter password action for Password (password) using page object locator.

kw.name: Click Sign In Button
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click Sign In Button

test.name: TC02 Verify successful login with valid username and password

kw.name: Open Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates current browser session to page URL.

kw.name: Enter User Name
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter text action for User Name (textbox) using page object locator.

kw.name: Enter Password
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter password action for Password (password) using page object locator.

kw.name: Click Sign In Button
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click Sign In Button

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

test.name: TC03 Verify login fails with incorrect username and correct password

kw.name: Open Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Click Button

Click Sign In Button

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
